Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Encounter Records RIFs │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 5 

BENE_DSCHRG_DT 

LABEL: Beneficiary Discharge Date 

DESCRIPTION: On an inpatient, SNF, or home health claim, the date the beneficiary was discharged/transferred from 
the facility or died. 

SHORT NAME: BENE_DSCHRG_DT 

LONG NAME: BENE_DSCHRG_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: —
